description: Core brand assets that should ALWAYS be used in creative generation

logos.description: Logo variants for different backgrounds. System will auto-select based on background color.

white.usage: Use on dark backgrounds (black, dark grays, dark product colors)

black.usage: Use on light backgrounds (cream, white, light tints)

green.usage: Use where brand green makes sense (special occasions, brand-focused content)

instructions.logoUsage: The system automatically selects the correct logo color based on background. White logo on dark, black logo on light, green for special emphasis.
instructions.colorSystem: All colors are defined in config/brand-colors.json. Follow the product color system and composition patterns.
instructions.addingLogos: Place new logo variants in brand-assets/assets/logo/ and add entries to the 'logos' section above
